title: Myobroma pubiflora
taxonomy: Myobroma pubiflora is classified within the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the order Gentianales, which is a group of flowering plants that also includes coffee and gardenias. The family Rubiaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants that are commonly known as the coffee or madder family. Myobroma pubiflora is a species of flowering plant, and its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and relationships of this plant within the Rubiaceae family.
uses: Myobroma pubiflora is a plant species with potential medicinal properties, although its uses are not extensively documented.
